title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 27 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 27 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 27 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures showed an N-shaped trend today. The most-traded contract I2609 ultimatelyclosed at 786 yuan/mt, with no change from the previous closing price. Spot prices remained stable compared to the previous day as of now.
